nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: Hucca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Enrico, Marcello, Salvatore, Silvio.

in part a metonymic occupational name for a grower and seller of gourds (squashes or marrows), from Italian zucca ‘gourd’ (from Late Latin cucutia, from classical Latin cucurbita). More often, however, it is a nickname from the same word used in its colloquial transferred sense ‘head’, in particular ‘empty head’.

variants.name: Zucconi
meanings: Italian: patronymic or plural form of an augmentative of Zucca or of a nickname from zuccone ‘dull, stubborn’, also ‘bald’.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Hucca de Singleton was born in 1094, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England as the son of Siward De Singleton. He had at least 6 sons with Mrs Hucca de Singleton. He died after 1170, in Broughton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Hucca de Singleton est né en 1094, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de Siward De Singleton. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Mrs Hucca de Singleton. Il est décédé après 1170, à Broughton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Hucca de Singleton wurde 1094 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von Siward De Singleton geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs Hucca de Singleton mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb nach 1170 in Broughton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Hucca de Singleton è nato il nel 1094 nel Kirkham, Lancashire, England come figlio di Siward De Singleton. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Mrs Hucca de Singleton. Morì dopo il 1170, nel Broughton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hucca de Singletonは1094年にイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムでSiward De Singletonの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs Hucca de Singletonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1170年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアブロウトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hucca de Singleton(은)는 1094년 영국 랭카실르 커크함에서 Siward De Singleton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs Hucca de Singleton(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1170년 이후 영국 랭카실르 브루그h턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hucca de Singleton nasceu em 1094, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de Siward De Singleton. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Mrs Hucca de Singleton. Ele faleceu após 1170, em Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Hucca de Singleton родился в 1094 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия. Его отца звали Siward De Singleton. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Mrs Hucca de Singleton. Он умер после 1170 г. в местности броугтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Hucca de Singleton nació en 1094, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de Siward De Singleton. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Mrs Hucca de Singleton. Murió después de 1170, en Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
